home.title: Chuyen dark mode va doi ngon ngu
home.description: Dung cac nut ben duoi de kiem tra light/dark mode, sau do thu chuyen qua lai giua English, Khmer va Vietnamese.

about.title: Mot starter nho gon de mo rong tiep.
about.description: TanStack Start cung cap routing an toan ve type, server functions va cac mac dinh hien dai. Ban co the dung no lam nen tang sach se, sau do bo sung route, styling va add-ons cua rieng minh.

profile.title: Xem truoc Profile
profile.description: Day la namespace mau cho profile de ban test translation theo tung page nhanh hon.
